visa_types.name: Multi Entry Short Term Visa: 30 Days
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Front/External Cover page and Bio page of the passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.
visa_types.processing_time: Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Short Term Visa : This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 30 days. Within the period of these 30 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However traveller should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 30th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended thrice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Before expiry of stay validity please contact below mentioned address along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy
- Timings : 7am-7pm (Mon-Thu) / 7am-6:30pm (Friday) / 9am-4pm Saturdays. Sunday Closed
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 30 Days from the first entry in UAE.

[Table:  Multi Entry Short Term Visa: 30 Days]
Kindly note: ((Duration of stay: 30 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax)
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 21 Dinar. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
*Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Multi Entry Short Term Visa : This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 30 days. Within the period of these 30 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However traveller should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 30th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended thrice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Before expiry of stay validity please contact below mentioned address along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy
- Timings : 7am-7pm (Mon-Thu) / 7am-6:30pm (Friday) / 9am-4pm Saturdays. Sunday Closed
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 30 Days from the first entry in UAE.

[Table:  Multi Entry Short Term Visa: 30 Days]
Kindly note: ((Duration of stay: 30 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax)
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 21 Dinar. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
*Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

## Mandatory Documents

- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Front/External Cover page and Bio page of the passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hYkzVWVU3gdaR0uwWm011/61c75c7dd384607b66254a0fb042b81a/Visa-Application-Form-DVPC-JORDAN-MAY-2026.pdf)
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the Supporting Documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list.
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria
Criteria I: Travel Record
An applicant who has travelled at least once in the last 3 years or has a valid visa for the USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada, Switzerland and Japan.
Supporting Documents Required:
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.

Criteria II: Financial RecordIn case the applicant is employed ;
Supporting Documents Required:
- Letter from the Employer, stating the Salary / Income, Job Description and the years of Employment with the organization.

Commercial Registration Certificate:
- In case of the Principal applicant carrying out own business, a copy of the Commercial Registration Certificate or
Security Deposit equivalent to JD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).

Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status

Supporting documents required:Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host. **Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.Relationship with the Host.UAE resident card of the Host.

Newly Married Couple:In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport;

Supporting documents required
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple.

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Long Term Visa 60 Days: This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 60 days. Within the period of these 60 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However traveller should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 60th day.After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum four times, allowed for 30 days each . Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
- Long Term Visit Single Entry – Tourist
- Long Term Visit Multiple Entry - Tourist
Please contact below mentioned address along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy
- Timings : Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 60 Days from the first entry in UAE.

[Table:  MULTI ENTRY LONG TERM VISA : 60 DAYS]
Kindly Note: ((Duration of stay: 60 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax)
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 21 Dinar. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

visa_types.name: DURATION OF STAY : 48 HOURS
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa Application form duly filled**
- Confirmed Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy Front/External Cover page and Bio page of the passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country they are traveling to from the UAE.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets)
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

visa_types.processing_time: Normal Visa Processing Time:5 – 6 working days from the date of submission ( Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
48 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 48 hours stay (As per flight schedule - Arrival/departure time in Dubai). This is Single Entry visa. Ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 48 Hours. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. The entry validity of the visa is for 30 days from the date of issue.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
48 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 48 hours stay (As per flight schedule - Arrival/departure time in Dubai). This is Single Entry visa. Ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 48 Hours. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. The entry validity of the visa is for 30 days from the date of issue.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Duration Of Stay: 48 Hours]
Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 30 days from the date of issue.
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 21 Dinar. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

## Mandatory Documents

- Visa Application form duly filled**
- Confirmed Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy Front/External Cover page and Bio page of the passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country they are traveling to from the UAE.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets)
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hYkzVWVU3gdaR0uwWm011/61c75c7dd384607b66254a0fb042b81a/Visa-Application-Form-DVPC-JORDAN-MAY-2026.pdf)

Instruction:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill in all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the Supporting Documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time:5 – 6 working days from the date of submission ( Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria
Criteria I: Travel Record
An applicant who has travelled at least once in the last 3 years or has a valid visa for the USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada, Switzerland and Japan.

Supporting Documents Required:
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.

Criteria II: Financial RecordIn case the applicant is employed;Supporting Documents Required:
- Letter from the Employer, stating the Salary / Income, Job Description and the years of Employment with the organization.

Commercial Registration Certificate:
- In case of the Principal applicant carrying out own business, a copy of the Commercial Registration Certificate or
Security Deposit equivalent to JD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE)

Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status
Supporting documents required:
Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host. **Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.Relationship with the Host.UAE resident card of the Host.Newly Married Couple:In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport:Supporting documents required
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

Supporting documents required
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple
Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.

- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets)
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
96 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 96 hours and is ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 4 days. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. Visa is valid for 30 days from the date of issue. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  DURATION OF STAY : 96 HOURS]
Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 30 days from the date of issue.
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 21 Dinar. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

## Mandatory Documents

- Visa Application form duly filled**
- Confirmed onward/return ticket copy of Emirates airline , highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Front/External Cover page and Bio page of the passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country they are traveling to from the UAE.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets)
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form. (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6hYkzVWVU3gdaR0uwWm011/61c75c7dd384607b66254a0fb042b81a/Visa-Application-Form-DVPC-JORDAN-MAY-2026.pdf)
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the Supporting Documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list.
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time:5 – 6 working days from the date of submission ( Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria

Criteria I: Travel Record
An applicant who has travelled at least once in the last 3 years or has a valid visa for the USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada, Switzerland and Japan. 
Supporting Documents Required:
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.
Criteria II: Financial Record
In case the applicant is employed;
Supporting Documents Required:
- Letter from the Employer, stating the Salary / Income, Job Description and the years of Employment with the organization.
Commercial Registration Certificate
- In case of the Principal applicant carrying out own business, a copy of the Commercial Registration Certificate.
OR
Security Deposit equivalent to JD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).

Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status
Supporting documents required:
Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host. **Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.
Relationship with the Host.
UAE resident card of the Host.
Newly Married Couple:
In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport:
Supporting documents required
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple
Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.name: DURATION OF STAY : 30 DAYS
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa Application form duly filled
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Front/External Cover page and Bio page of the passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
30 Days Visit Visa (Tourist) : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid until date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended thrice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before the expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Timings : 7am-7pm (Mon-Thu) / 7am-6:30pm (Friday) / 9am-4pm Saturdays. Sunday Closed
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
30 Days Visit Visa (Tourist) : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid until date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended thrice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before the expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Timings : 7am-7pm (Mon-Thu) / 7am-6:30pm (Friday) / 9am-4pm Saturdays. Sunday Closed

Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.

- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
